settings.title: Chicken Picking Masterclass
settings.description: The complete breakdown of Greg's most requested technique, from the thumb-and-finger foundation to full hybrid picking integration.

settings.title: Travis Picking Deep Dive
settings.description: How Greg learned it with a flat pick instead of a thumb pick, and how to build the boom-chuck foundation without rushing.

settings.title: Chord Vocabulary Breakdown
settings.description: The James Burton ninth bend, Robben Ford chord melody, artificial harmonics, the Allan Holdsworth minor 11th, the Steely Dan sus chord.

settings.title: Outside Playing & Harmonic Color
settings.description: Pentatonic substitutions, chromatic approaches, diminished arpeggios, the tritone sub, and the Mahavishnu scale.

settings.title: Tone & Gear Rundown
settings.description: The full live rig: Reverend signature guitars, Fishman Fluence pickups, the Tone King Royalist, and every pedal on the board.

settings.title: Blues Soloing Concepts
settings.description: Playing over changes, the Jeff Beck whammy and harmonic techniques, self-accompanied blues, the Allman Brothers approach.

settings.title: Song Breakdown: Tonus Diabolicus
settings.description: Note-for-note construction of a signature composition and where every idea came from.

settings.title: Song Breakdown: Spank It
settings.description: The 1988 riff that became a cornerstone, with exact right-hand mechanics.

settings.title: The Gristle Vault Master Reference PDF
settings.description: A 12-page compiled reference covering every technique, concept, voicing, gear spec, and principle from all 8 videos. Built to keep open while you watch.

settings.heading: Access the Gristle Vault
settings.subhead: 8 videos. 4+ hours. One PDF that ties it all together. All of it free.
settings.italic_line: Every secret Greg probably shouldn't have shared.
settings.consent_label: I agree to receiving marketing and promotional materials from Greg Koch.
settings.success_message: Check your email for vault access.
settings.inside_intro: Not one throwaway lesson. A full stash of Greg's core techniques, tone ideas, harmonic concepts, gear breakdowns, and real-world playing insights from multiple full-length sessions.
settings.closing_line: Total value: 4+ hours of instruction, 8 sessions, 1 reference guide. All free.
